textByHash.08eed086e186bddd810e86a32663a90788832ca8: Oh, not much really. We're all still hiding from the vampyres and eking out a living from this terrible place.
textByHash.268d3af92f7d5a97f1257bed67ca5c938f66af7d: It's just perfect. Thanks so much for your efforts.
textByHash.4d2852af509ec15507de46a99df7fc0f3f5fc904: I've never really seen or known a hero before, so I have nothing to compare one to, but I suspect in most people's judgement, you would be one! I for one am very pleased to have met you.
textByHash.8f9d87c90f226977c9f0e9e47205e41c62c3c056: I'm Cornelius. I don't really do anything here.
textByHash.a611e00ba951742572ff70799cbccd9eecf30cfe: I'm Cornelius. I run the bank now.
textByHash.ac152922be1e4b318e2bd3c68ee7804073b25d20: Hopefully soon we'll be strong enough to make the journey across the Salve.
textByHash.ad27488bf84fd2ae1d36d4f1c262afa741288fb1: Well, the bank is all fixed now, but it isn't going to serve people all on its own. You'll have to recruit someone!
textByHash.bf3140a430dd44570a55c46c59766258a328d9db: I'd best go and get changed now...
textByHash.ce77cb7cca21f71d2cc705ae67789c607c864a19: Me? Why, I guess I could... Yes, in fact, I'm sure I could!
textByHash.d5d2aee7dd853c06b12a741ed95cc62f40829f44: Hey it's the hero! Thank you so much for saving us from Gadderanks. And the town is looking lovely as well. You've done a great job!
textByHash.dd26560cea49896a5944db461e6fdab0e85c355c: Not as far as I know. We have some basic amenities now which is so very useful and we're all incredibly grateful to you.
